title: Solvent Extraction Separation of Titanium from Aqueous Oxalate Solution with Tri-n-octylamine
author: A. CHATTERJEE
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, University of Burdwan, Burdwan-713 104 

  Manuscript received 4 December 7989, revised 12 June 1990, accepted 24 September 1990  

 The use of tri-n-octylamine (TOA) as liquid anion-exchanger in the quantitative and selective extraction of titanium(IV) from aqueous oxalate medium is reported.The effects of different parameters on the extraction behaviour have been studied. The method has been used In the estimation of titanium in some river clay samples.
